findings.issue: resumeAfter = Number(lastEventId) has no finite-number guard; a corrupted/non-numeric lastEventId on reconnect yields NaN, and index > NaN is always false, so every replay line is silently dropped with no error surfaced.
findings.fix_hint: Guard with Number.isFinite(parsed) ? parsed : -1, and add a journal-tail.test.ts case for a non-numeric lastEventId asserting full replay from 0.

findings.issue: appRouter's runs.get spreads { ...snapshot, repoUrl } but no test exists for src/server/api.ts anywhere in the diff, including the ok:false + repoUrl shape.
findings.fix_hint: Add api.test.ts (or extend runs.test.ts) calling appRouter.createCaller({}).runs.get for both a found and missing run.

findings.issue: Root page's newest-run resolution and zero-runs empty state (requirements 1.3/1.4) have no test coverage; no src/app/page.test.tsx exists in the diff.
findings.fix_hint: Add a page.test.tsx that mocks listRuns() to return runs and asserts RunView is rendered with the lexicographically-first runId, plus a zero-runs case asserting the empty state renders without crashing.

findings.issue: The live (non-finished) subscription path's index-dedup (req 4.5), GateBanner RUNNING wiring, and StageTree/JournalFeed live line-append are still never exercised by any test, even though a new test was added for the finished-adoption/refetch behavior.
findings.fix_hint: Add a test that drives onData with a tracked line event plus a duplicate-index event and asserts the line appears once in the feed and GateBanner shows RUNNING.

findings.issue: HALTED test only sets halt_kind with no gate/error, so detailText = summary.gate ?? summary.error ?? "" is always "" and the branch that actually renders halt detail text is untested.
findings.fix_hint: Add cases with { halt_kind, gate } and { halt_kind, error } asserting the detail text renders.

findings.issue: leg-start, battery, and evt row-rendering branches in JournalRow are untested; only leg-complete, unknown, and log+source-badge are covered.
findings.fix_hint: Add render assertions for a leg-start row, a battery row (start and completion with exitCode), and an evt row showing evtType + payload summary.

findings.issue: Design.md explicitly commits to buffering partial trailing lines until their newline arrives, but no test ever appends a chunk without a trailing newline to prove the incomplete line isn't emitted early.
findings.fix_hint: Append a chunk with no trailing newline, assert no new tracked event fires, then append the closing newline and assert exactly one event fires.

findings.issue: STATUS_DOT_CLASSES (the emerald/red/amber leg-status color map) is defined identically and independently in journal-feed.tsx and stage-tree.tsx.
findings.fix_hint: Extract to a shared src/components/run-view/status-dot.ts and import from both files.

findings.issue: fileExists and statMtimeMs in journal-tail.ts duplicate fileExists and mtimeMsOf already defined in runs.ts, which journal-tail.ts already imports from.
findings.fix_hint: Move both helpers into a shared src/server/fs-helpers.ts and import from both runs.ts and journal-tail.ts.

findings.issue: GateBannerProps.feature is declared and required at every call site but never read inside the component; the MERGED feature name is derived independently from summary.gate.
findings.fix_hint: Remove the feature prop from GateBannerProps and drop feature={null} from the run-view.tsx call site.

findings.issue: run-view.tsx and now-line.tsx each run an independent 30s setInterval to track 'now', duplicating the same clock tick for no functional reason.
findings.fix_hint: Have RunView pass its own now state down as a prop instead of NowLine maintaining a second ticker.

findings.issue: LegRow never renders line.error for a failed leg-complete or battery row in the JournalFeed, unlike StageTree which shows it under the failed leg.
findings.fix_hint: Render the error string (when present) as a muted red inline detail in LegRow for failed status, matching StageTree's treatment.
